subcodes.first_line: O torch in the divine chapel, illumine the world. Take light from the sun
subcodes.first_line_orig: شمع شبستان حق نور بافاق بخش مقتبس از شمس شو شعله و اشراق بخش شرق منور نما غرب
subcodes.subjects: @poems and quotation from poetry, @praise and encouragement, @East and West; communication between East and West, @call to action
